basics.name: Prince Kushwaha
basics.title: Full Stack Developer
basics.summary: Results-driven Full Stack Developer with hands-on experience building scalable, production-grade web applications. Proficient across the entire stack — from crafting pixel-perfect React/Next.js frontends to architecting robust Node.js & Python backends deployed on AWS. Passionate about clean code, performance optimization, and delivering impactful digital products that solve real-world problems.
highlights: 4+ production web applications deployed and maintained
Experience with React, Next.js, Node.js, Python, FastAPI
AWS cloud infrastructure (EC2, S3, VPS hosting)
Framer Motion & Tailwind CSS for modern UIs

education.description: Focused on Data Structures, Algorithms, Web Technologies, Machine Learning, and Software Engineering.

experience.description: Spearheading full-stack development for multiple client projects, from ideation to deployment. Building scalable web platforms with Next.js, React, Node.js, and Python, deployed on AWS infrastructure with zero-downtime CI/CD pipelines.
achievements: Architected & deployed RG Consultancy corporate website with 100/100 Lighthouse score
Built RG Care NGO platform processing $50k+ in donations with 200+ active volunteers
Developed RG US Debt financial advisory portal with FastAPI-powered calculators
Created Lead Management System (CRM) increasing sales conversions by 25%
Managed AWS EC2 instances, Nginx reverse proxies, and PM2 process management

experience.description: Gained industry exposure in ML/AI by working on real-world data science projects. Applied statistical analysis, feature engineering, and predictive modeling techniques to extract actionable business insights from large datasets.
achievements: Analyzed 100k+ data points using Pandas, NumPy, and Scikit-learn
Built classification models with 89% accuracy for trend prediction
Created interactive data visualizations using Matplotlib and Seaborn

certifications: Full Stack Web Development — Self-Taught & Industry Projects
